title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: WasmCPT handle UAF by import dispatch table growth
bounty_rationale: v8 sandbox bypass with controllable write
description_snippet:
### VULNERABILITY DETAILS

#### Summary

V8 sandbox bypass through WasmCPT handle UAF by growing `dispatch_table_for_imports` to transfer away its `WasmDispatchTableData`. Entries in the original table are still reachable through imported function calls but has wrapper refcnt holder transferred away
